content: Tom still rides the bicycle that his parents gave him when he was thirteen years old.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Tom usa ancora la bicicletta che gli hanno dato i suoi genitori quando aveva tredici anni
